editContext.description: logoId changed from 6 (favicon.png, 512x512 square) to 214 (logo.svg, 226x58 landscape) on all 9 header-main blocks. No code files were modified.

rawContent.note: Content changed (logoId 6 -> 214). Code unmodified. Full QA run required due to content change.

contentComparison.reason: Content changed — logo attribute updated. All checks run per scope: build, sync, test page integrity, logo rendering.

build.details: bun run build completed without errors. TypeScript compilation succeeded.

lint.details: 1 lint error found in FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx (nested ternary, line 181) — pre-existing issue unrelated to this header edit cycle. 8 warnings for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps across Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs — all pre-existing, unrelated to Header. No Header block files have lint errors.

unrelatedErrors.note: Pre-existing issue outside this edit cycle scope

registration.details: Block registration valid. apiVersion correct, name matches takt/header pattern, all file references exist, child blocks registered correctly, attribute types valid.

tsxPhpSync.details: taktician_validate_all sync check passed. No $attributes extraction anti-pattern found. @var docblock annotations present. PHP function existence verified. One structural warning noted (TSX depth-1 has 0 elements vs PHP 3 elements) — this is expected behavior: HeaderMain.tsx uses Gutenberg editor InnerBlocks components at depth 1 (not direct DOM elements), while HeaderMain.php renders the actual logo anchor, desktop column div, and mobile toggle div directly. This is correct TSX/PHP architecture for this block type.

structureWarning.message: TSX has 0 elements vs PHP 3 elements at depth 1 — expected due to InnerBlocks editor abstraction vs PHP direct rendering

testPageIntegrity.details: All 9 header instances present. All wrapped in takt/demo-container. No stale markup. No placeholder IDs. All 9 header-main blocks confirmed logoId: 214.
testPageIntegrity.logoIdVerification: All 9 instances have logoId: 214 (confirmed via taktician_validate_test_page block tree)

logoRendering.details: Logo link (a.block.self-stretch) present on all 9 instances. Logo uses theme_output_svg_or_img() which renders media ID 214 (logo.svg) inline — explains absence of tag. Logo link classes confirmed: 'block self-stretch w-auto **:w-auto **:max-w-full **:h-full **:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:**:max-h-[26px] md:**:max-h-[58px]'. Self-stretch causes logo to span full height of the flex container (both rows: utility row + nav row). Desktop screenshot confirms full IGNITE logo (bee icon + wordmark) renders correctly spanning both rows at 1440px.
logoRendering.logoClasses: block self-stretch w-auto **:w-auto **:max-w-full **:h-full **:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:**:max-h-[26px] md:**:max-h-[58px]
